name: Olares
description: Olares is an open-source personal cloud operating system for self-hosting AI models, applications, and data with enterprise-grade security. Run local LLMs, sync files, stream media, and manage your digital life.

notes.text: Requires activation via LarePass mobile app after installation.
Minimum 150GB SSD storage required - HDD installations will fail.
x86-64 architecture only - ARM processors are not supported.
For GPU support (AI workloads), NVIDIA Turing or newer required.
After VM creation, wait 5-10 minutes for Olares installation to complete.
Access Olares at https://desktop.{your-id}.olares.com after activation.
